summary: Created responsive HTML email template for FOHE NYC newsletters with Gmail compatibility, purple branding, and all required sections. Template includes header with FOHE branding, intro section, community highlights with card layout, survey insights with stats display, upcoming events with CTA buttons, and footer with social links. All template variables properly implemented using {{VAR}} syntax.
learnings: HTML email templates require table-based layouts and inline CSS for maximum Gmail compatibility
Mobile responsiveness in emails needs careful @media queries and conditional styling
Purple gradient branding (#8B5CF6) works well with white background and dark gray text for professional newsletter design
